params.name: Cairo Declaration
params.source: Fragment Crafting (4.6%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.18%), Wishing (0.17%)
params.description:
On Jul 1, 1943, the leaders of allied countries signed this treaty and prepared for the meeting.

Leaders of the Allies gathered in Cairo to discuss the reconstruction of the international order after the victory of World War II. Japan would return all occupied territories after the war and grant Korea's freedom and independence. "Declaration Contents:" the Allies' intentions to continue deploying military force until Japan's unconditional surrender; Japan be stripped of all the islands in the P …
